text: And then we started the dissection of the hilum.
After the identification of the right upper lobe vein, the apical segment was isolated.
The then apical segment was stapled with the endovascular stapler.
The next step was to expose the segmental branches of the artery.
We identified two apical brotches that were stapled.
The segmental bronchus was dissected and then stapled.
In this phase, endocyanine green was injected into the blood via a peripheral vein.
We use a fluorescence imaging camera and the apical segment showed no color because it was already isolated and the intersegmental plane was identified.
This plane was marked by an electrocautery.
